title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 37.1091 - Database created, availability on accountability portal and department website
text:
37.1091.  Database created, availability on accountability portal and department website. — The "Missouri Local Government Expenditure Database" is hereby created and shall be maintained on the Missouri accountability portal, established under section 37.850, by the office of administration.  The database shall be available on the office of administration website and shall include information about expenditures made during each fiscal year that begins after December 31, 2022.  The database shall be publicly accessible without charge.
(L. 2021 H.B. 271)
